title: Developer reviews controlled coding workflow proposal
user_goal: As a developer, ask the system to analyze a small coding task and produce a plan, diff proposal, test result and review summary without applying, committing, pushing or deploying changes.
expected_user_visible_outputs: no auto commit / push / deploy evidence
claim_guard_notes: This scenario must not be counted as autonomous coding workflow readiness.
redaction_guard_notes: Future evidence must store redacted refs only.
